study.title: Metagenome-Assembled-Genomes from Microbiomes Fermenting Dairy Coproducts
study.description: To advance knowledge of microbial communities capable of fermenting agroindustrial residues into value-added products, we report metagenomes of microbial communities from six anaerobic bioreactors that were fed a mixture of ultra-filtered milk permeate and cottage cheese acid whey.
